nasb.text: The Lord will deliver them up before you, and you shall do to them according to all the commandments which I have commanded you.

esv.text: And the Lord will give them over to you, and you shall do to them according to the whole commandment that I have commanded you.

cnv.text: 耶和華必把他們交給你們，你們照著我吩咐你們的一切命令對待他們。

ccb.text: 耶和华要把他们交给你们，你们要照我的一切吩咐处置他们。
